Clinical Reasoning: All provided evidence describes metformin solely in the context of its glucose-lowering properties, specifically reducing hepatic glucose production and enhancing insulin sensitivity. There is no mention of any antitumor effects, anti-inflammatory actions, or involvement in cancer-related pathways. Therefore, based strictly on the available information, metformin does not exhibit documented antitumor effects.
